title: Add improvement ticket generation (Golden Test 20)
problem: ticket-021 completes run reporting, but rejection patterns do not yet generate actionable improvement tickets. Golden Test 20 requires tickets from run report failure modes.
evidence: docs/agents/00_GOLDEN_TESTS.md Test 20: rejection patterns generate improvement tickets.
acceptance_criteria: Deterministic improvement ticket generation from run report failure modes without Ollama.
Tickets include evidence, expected files, acceptance criteria, test plan, non-goals, and rollback plan.
non_goals: Do not implement LangGraph or live web discovery.
Do not add public write routes.
